name: Silitech Technology Corporation
summary: Silitech Technology Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of modules and rubber (plastic) products in China, Malaysia, Taiwan, the United States, India, and internationally. It offers various products, including mobile keypads, cover glasses, modules, auto parts, lighting modules, and accessories. The company's products are used in wearable device, automotive component, communication supply, and toy product applications. Silitech Technology Corporation was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
